creator: gshapiro+FreeBSD-gnats@gshapiro.net
text:
FreeBSD-4.0 includes WEP support for the WaveLAN cards.  I'd like to see
this support included in 3.4-STABLE.

Fix: The patch below takes the changes done to the HEAD (when 4.0 was the head)
and MFC's them to 3.4-STABLE.  The patches have been working fine for me.
